title: Cleartrip: #1 Site for Booking Flights Tickets & Hotels Online - Get Best Travel Deals
meta_description: Book cheap flight and air tickets at the lowest fares on Cleartrip. Find great deals on domestic and international flight bookings – all in one place.
text_content: Biggest discounts on Flights Up to 25% off | Flights starting at ₹999 | Free Visa Rejection Cover One way Round trip 1 Adult, Economy Sun, Mar 22 Return Select to avail benefits Business Fares by Cleartrip Unlock 10% extra savings Low or Zero Cancellation Charges Free* seats & meals GST Invoice Assurance Unlock 10% extra savings SAVE MORE Student Extra baggage, discounts Only students above the age of 12 with valid ID can avail this special fare and any additional baggage allowance Senior citizen Up to ₹600 off Only senior citizens above the age of 60 years can avail this special fare. Armed forces Up to ₹600 off Only serving/retired Indian armed forces personnel & their dependents can avail this fare. Non-stop flights only Search flights Popular destinations About Cleartrip Launched in July 2006, Cleartrip Pvt Ltd ., a Flipkart company, has emerged as India's fastest-growing online travel technology company. In April 2021, Flipkart acquired a majority stake in Cleartrip. Cleartrip recently emerged as the no. 2 OTA player as per a study by VIDEC. With an aggressive plan to emerge as a leading innovator in the industry, Cleartrip is on its way to building a differentiated value proposition for its customers looking for end-to-end travel solutions. With industry-first offerings including ClearChoice Plus , ClearChoice Max and Cancel for No Reason ', Cleartrip has a clear vision to provide innovative solutions in the OTA segment. Combining intuitive products with a customer-centric approach and a wide selection of flights, hotels, buses and holiday packages, Cleartrip brings a unique selling point to the market, offering its customers convenience, choice, competitive prices, and premium content. How Does Cleartrip Help You Plan Your Travel? Cleartrip offers a collection of everything you need for a perfect trip. All can be done simultaneously, from flights to taxis to hotel bookings. This is how planning flights and hotels with Cleartrip gives you a clear edge:- ClearChoice Max : It offers free cancellation or rescheduling for domestic (up to 24 hours before departure) and international flights (up to 72 hours before departure). ClearChoice Plus : Free date or airline change up to 12 hours (or 24 hours for Air India* and Vistara*) before departure. Easy hotel cancellation : You can quickly cancel your hotel stay. There are no costs for hotel cancellations up to 24 hours before check-in at over 20,000 hotels. Instant refund initiation : All flight and hotel cancellation refunds are processed immediately. Medi-cancel refund : Cancel your domestic flight booking for sound medical reasons and receive up to INR 3500 against airline cancellation charges per person per segment. International travel insurance : For only INR 89 per user daily, you can get stress-free coverage against a wide range of uncertainties for all foreign destinations. Special fares for armed personnel, senior citizens, and student travellers : Cleartrip has introduced lower pricing on domestic flights for armed personnel, senior citizens, and students. Coupon codes provide further discounts. Why Choose Cleartrip for Flight Booking? Cleartrip is a trusted travel booking platform known for its transparent pricing, reliable customer support, and seamless booking experience. Here’s why millions of travellers choose Cleartrip for booking flights: Best Deals & Transparent Pricing - No hidden charges, just competitive fares to save money. Flexible Booking & Cancellations - Modify or cancel your booking with ease. Wide Airline Options - Compare flight ticket pricing from multiple carriers in one place. Seamless Booking Process - Quick search, secure payment, and instant confirmation. 24/7 Customer Support - Assistance anytime, anywhere for a smooth journey. How to Book Flights on Cleartrip? Booking flights on Cleartrip is quick and easy. Follow these simple steps to secure your domestic or international flight tickets: Enter Your Travel Details - Select your departure and arrival locations, travel dates, and the number of passengers. Compare Flight Options - Browse through available airlines, fares, and schedules. Select the Best Flight - Choose a flight that fits your budget and timing. Complete the Booking - Enter passenger details, apply any available offers, and make a secure payment. Receive Instant Confirmation - Get an e-ticket and travel details in your inbox. Whether you need to book domestic flights for a weekend getaway or book international flights for a vacation abroad, Cleartrip provides a smooth and convenient experience. Enjoy a Hassle-Free Travel Experience At Cleartrip, we go beyond just flight bookings. Our platform helps travellers with: Real-time flight status tracking Secure payment and data protection Comprehensive travel insurance options Baggage allowance details and add-ons Special assistance services for senior citizens and infants From budget flights to luxury travel, Cleartrip ensures a smooth, stress-free booking process, helping you save both time and money. FAQs: Flights, Hotels, Bus and Train Booking on Cleartrip What services does Cleartrip offer? Cleartrip is dedicated to making travel easy, economical, and uncomplicated, from international to domestic flights, from early morning to late night flights, and from budget to luxury flights. Cleartrip allows you to book your flight with just a few clicks. Our features include: ClearChoice Max offers free cancellation or rescheduling for domestic and international flights. ClearChoice Plus: Free date or airline change up to 12 hours before departure. Medical reasons to cancel your domestic travel, and receive up to INR3500 compensation against airline cancellation charges per person per segment. How do I create an account on Cleartrip? For all your travel bookings, sign up on Cleartrip. Go to the home page, click the link (top right), and enter your email address. We'll then send you an account activation link. Click it, and you'll be able to access your Cleartrip account. The account activation link expires three days after you provide us with your email address, so please activate your account within that time frame. How can I contact Cleartrip customer support? You can reach Cleartrip Customer Support and Phone Number. Contact us at +91 9595333333. We are here to assist you with your booking and rescheduling queries. How do I search for flights on Cleartrip? We make it relatively simple to search and book Cleartrip flights Enter source and destination cities/airports. Select the date of travel. Select the number of travellers. Hit enter, and you're done! You have a search list of all available flights, sorted by price. How do I search for hotels on Cleartrip? Booking a hotel online has never been easier than it is with Cleartrip. Click the 'hotels' tab on the site. Enter the city/locality/landmark/hotel name in the search bar. Enter the check-in and check-out dates. Choose the number of travellers and press enter. You may also refine your hotel booking search results by utilising parameters such as price, star rating, traveller rating, facilities, and preferences such as hill-view or couple-friendly hotels. Cleartrip offers hotels for all types of stays. Cleartrip hotels are curated to give you the best value for your money. How do I book train tickets on Cleartrip? Cleartrip enables you to buy train tickets and search for them. Simply click 'check availability' on the search results page, and you will find the book button to click for bookings. Booking Cleartrip trains is simple and fast Disclaimer In addition to the above, the data presented here cannot be assumed reliable; instead, it may vary over time in response to changing demands.
